page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2g.4xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 16 dedicated physical cores with 1.0 thread per core, providing 16 vCPUs. The hardware configuration includes 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding 4.0 GB of RAM per core, and is bundled with 1919 GB of local SSD storage. Network connectivity is supported by a 3 Gbps baseline bandwidth.

Performance benchmarks indicate a clear distinction between single-core and multi-core capabilities. Single-core performance, measured via stress-ng and Geekbench, falls into the bottom 25%, and single-threaded gzip compression is in the bottom 10%. However, multi-core performance scales to average levels, as demonstrated by stress-ng multi-core, Passmark CPU, and Geekbench multi-core scores. Memory bandwidth tests show average read and write speeds for large blocks, though the overall Passmark memory score remains in the bottom 25%.

The inclusion of a substantial 1919 GB local SSD makes this instance type qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring significant local storage without the overhead of external block storage. Given the average performance in database operations, Redis SET operations, and static web serving, this server is well-suited for relational databases, caching layers, and general-purpose web serving. It is less optimal for single-threaded tasks or intensive LLM inference, where it exhibits weak performance on medium-sized models.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2g.4xlarge is an x86_64 server featuring 16 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 vCPUs operating at 2.5 GHz, paired with 64.0 GB of RAM and 1919 GB of local SSD storage. Running on the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and a 3 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmark data reveals weak single-core performance but average multi-core processing, memory bandwidth, and database execution capabilities. The integrated high-capacity SSD storage offers qualitative cost efficiency by eliminating external storage dependencies for data-heavy operations. This server is best suited for databases, Redis caching, static web serving, and multi-threaded general-purpose workloads, though it is less effective for single-threaded tasks or complex machine learning inference.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2g.4xlarge is an x86_64 server with 16 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and 1919 GB of local SSD storage, offering balanced multi-core performance for databases and web serving.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2g.4xlarge features 16 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and 1919 GB local SSD storage for database and general-purpose workloads.
tagline: A dedicated multi-core server featuring high-capacity local SSD storage and balanced memory for database and general-purpose workloads.
bullet_points: 16 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs and 64 GB of RAM
1919 GB of integrated local SSD storage
Average multi-core and database benchmark performance
Suited for databases, caching, and static web serving
